testcase.classname: GET /api/products // should return all products successfully
testcase.name: GET /api/products // should return all products successfully

testcase.classname: GET /api/products // should return an empty array when no products exist
testcase.name: GET /api/products // should return an empty array when no products exist

testcase.classname: GET /api/products // should return 500 on database error
testcase.name: GET /api/products // should return 500 on database error

testcase.classname: GET /api/products/:id // should return a single product by ID
testcase.name: GET /api/products/:id // should return a single product by ID

testcase.classname: GET /api/products/:id // should return 404 when product is not found
testcase.name: GET /api/products/:id // should return 404 when product is not found

testcase.classname: GET /api/products/:id // should return 500 on database error
testcase.name: GET /api/products/:id // should return 500 on database error

testcase.classname: POST /api/products // should create a product successfully without images
testcase.name: POST /api/products // should create a product successfully without images

testcase.classname: POST /api/products // should reject when more than 5 images are uploaded
testcase.name: POST /api/products // should reject when more than 5 images are uploaded

testcase.classname: POST /api/products // should return 500 on save failure
testcase.name: POST /api/products // should return 500 on save failure

testcase.classname: PUT /api/products/:id // should update product fields successfully
testcase.name: PUT /api/products/:id // should update product fields successfully

testcase.classname: PUT /api/products/:id // should return 404 if product does not exist
testcase.name: PUT /api/products/:id // should return 404 if product does not exist

testcase.classname: PUT /api/products/:id // should reject when more than 5 new images are uploaded
testcase.name: PUT /api/products/:id // should reject when more than 5 new images are uploaded

testcase.classname: PUT /api/products/:id // should delete old Cloudinary images when new ones are provided
testcase.name: PUT /api/products/:id // should delete old Cloudinary images when new ones are provided

testcase.classname: PUT /api/products/:id // should return 500 on database error
testcase.name: PUT /api/products/:id // should return 500 on database error

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/products/:id // should delete a product successfully
testcase.name: DELETE /api/products/:id // should delete a product successfully

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/products/:id // should purge all associated Cloudinary images on delete
testcase.name: DELETE /api/products/:id // should purge all associated Cloudinary images on delete

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/products/:id // should return 404 when product does not exist
testcase.name: DELETE /api/products/:id // should return 404 when product does not exist

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/products/:id // should return 500 on database error
testcase.name: DELETE /api/products/:id // should return 500 on database error

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should create a new user successfully
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should create a new user successfully

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should fail when required fields are missing
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should fail when required fields are missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if email already exists
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if email already exists

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if username already exists
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if username already exists

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should reject admin role creation
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should reject admin role creation

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if role is invalid
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register // should fail if role is invalid

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/login // should login successfully with valid credentials
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/login // should login successfully with valid credentials

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/login // should fail with wrong password
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/login // should fail with wrong password

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if user does not exist
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if user does not exist

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if user account is blocked
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if user account is blocked

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if emailOrUsername or password is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/login // should fail if emailOrUsername or password is missing

testcase.classname: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should verify email with a valid token
testcase.name: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should verify email with a valid token

testcase.classname: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should fail with an expired or invalid token
testcase.name: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token // should fail with an expired or invalid token

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should resend verification email for an unverified user
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should resend verification email for an unverified user

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should return generic message if user is not found (security)
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should return generic message if user is not found (security)

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should fail if email is already verified
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should fail if email is already verified

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should fail if email field is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/resend-verification // should fail if email field is missing

testcase.classname: MANUAL: Resend API config smoke test via /api/auth/resend-verification // should register a temp user and trigger resend-verification against live Resend API
testcase.name: MANUAL: Resend API config smoke test via /api/auth/resend-verification // should register a temp user and trigger resend-verification against live Resend API
